dsl_rule.translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_5 (Turtle Rules breakout system): Donchian channels are used to detect 20-day and 10-day breakouts. The entry uses 20-day Donchian (dc_upper for long, dc_lower for short), and exit uses 10-day Donchian (dc_lower for long exit, dc_upper for short exit). The signal is context-dependent, entering long on 20-day high breakout and short on 20-day low breakout, with exits triggered by reversals at 10-day extremes. Note: Donchian indicator available is a single channel; assumed to use 20-day lookback for entry levels and 10-day for exit levels per the original specification.

backtest_rule.reason: KAUFMAN_DRY_5 (Turtle Rules breakout system): Donchian channels are used to detect 20-day and 10-day breakouts. The entry uses 20-day Donchian (dc_upper for long, dc_lower for short), and exit uses 10-day Donchian (dc_lower for long exit, dc_upper for short exit). The signal is context-dependent, entering long on 20-day high breakout and short on 20-day low breakout, with exits triggered by reversals at 10-day extremes. Note: Donchian indicator available is a single channel; assumed to use 20-day lookback for entry levels and 10-day for exit levels per the original specification.

source_rule_text: Enter long when intraday high exceeds the highest high of previous 20 days; exit when intraday low falls below the lowest low of previous 10 days. Enter short when intraday low falls below the lowest low of previous 20 days; exit when intraday high exceeds the highest high of previous 10 days.
